name: Bread Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1 Spread ketchup evenly on one side of a white bread slice.
2 Add a small amount (about 1/4 teaspoon) of oregano over the ketchup.
3 Place an american cheese slice on top of the oregano, covering the entire surface.
4 Cut the hot dog into small round pieces measuring approximately 1/8 to 1/4 inch in size. Aim for about 5-6 pieces per bread slice.
5 Arrange the hot dog pieces evenly over the cheese.
6 Place the assembled pizza in a toaster oven and bake until the cheese is melted and bubbly, usually around 2-3 minutes.
7 Remove from the toaster oven when done and let cool slightly before serving.
